# RepoScan

Worktree scanner: one registered checkout -> RepoSnapshot with badges, never a crash.

**Tier:** Core

## Modules

| Module | Size | Classes | Functions |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| `guardrail_hub.repo_scan` | S | 0 | 2 |

## Public API

### `guardrail_hub.repo_scan`
- def `component_rows` ‚Äî Merge the snapshot's per-component graph/size/complexity stats into rows.
- def `scan` ‚Äî Read one registered checkout into a RepoSnapshot (never raises).
